title: Add Flow Linnom to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Flow Linnom](https://flow.linnom.com) to chat
- Flow Linnom provides a chat interface to access multiple AI language models.

Fixes #11965

gist.headline: Flow Linnom joins the garden
gist.blurb: Flow Linnom just landed in our community apps! It's a sleek new chat interface for accessing multiple AI language models.
gist.summary: Added Flow Linnom, a multi-model chat interface, to the community apps directory and Greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore Flow Linnom directly from our community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a chat interface app called 'Flow Linnom' to the community Greenhouse. Visuals should include the pollinations bee (Polly) in a greenhouse or garden setting, looking at a chat interface or a flowing stream of chat bubbles. 'Flow' suggests water or smooth movement.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot in a lush digital greenhouse, watering a glowing chat-bubble plant next to a gentle stream of water. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
